subject: WM-0164 ready for review
body: Implemented schema-v3 GameSession projection v1 and public validation, continuous 0/30/60/90 TPS Simulation Worker hosting, latest-wins projection outbox with reliable messages, fail-closed browser negotiation, Chromium autonomous scheduling smoke, Worker/headless parity, schema-3 Web consumer fixtures, and documented save/load limitations; all WM-0164 required checks and 445-test quality gate pass
